query:
-- Update customer aggregate stats
UPDATE customers 
SET 
  monthlySpend = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyCost), 0) FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0087' AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')),
  monthlyRevenue = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0087' AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated'))
WHERE externalId = 'C0087';

-- Verify the result
SELECT externalId, name, monthlySpend, monthlyRevenue,
  CASE WHEN monthlySpend > 0 AND monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN ROUND((monthlyRevenue - monthlySpend) / monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as marginPct
FROM customers WHERE externalId = 'C0087';
